summary:
## Three-Way Match Result: **BLOCK** | $46,893.55

**Recommended Action:** Block payment and route to AP manager.

**Critical Finding:** Invoice BILL/2026/03/0067 claims delivery of significantly more units than were actually received across all four line items. The most material discrepancy is SKU PG-CTL-S71200 (PLC Module): invoiced 31 units but only 26 received—a 19% overbill on the highest-value SKU ($38,750 claimed vs. $32,500 ordered). Additionally, O-Ring Kit invoiced 6 vs. 2 received, Copper Pipe invoiced 24 vs. 21 received, and Gate Valve invoiced 10 vs. 8 received. All quantities exceed goods receipt. Hold this invoice pending reconciliation with the vendor on why quantities received do not match quantities billed.
